description_for_human: Sistem Informasi Track Record Alumni Universitas Amikom Surakarta — platform resmitracer study untuk alumni.
description_for_model: SITRACK is the official alumni tracer study platform for Universitas Amikom Surakarta. It tracks career records, collects questionnaire data for accreditation, and provides a career center for alumni. The platform uses Next.js, Supabase, and implements role-based access control.
